Title: Official Trezor Suite — Desktop® & Web App for Hardware Wallets
HTML: Official Trezor Suite — Desktop® & Web App for Hardware WalletsThe Official Trezor Suite is the all-in-one software platform designed to work seamlessly with Trezor hardware wallets, providing users with a secure, private, and user-friendly environment to manage cryptocurrencies. Available as both a Desktop® application and a Web App, Trezor Suite represents the evolution of crypto asset management—combining advanced security, transparent open-source design, and a modern interface built for both beginners and experienced users.As digital assets continue to gain global adoption, the need for reliable, self-custodial solutions has never been more important. Trezor Suite empowers users to take full control of their crypto holdings without relying on centralized exchanges or third parties, staying true to the foundational principles of decentralization and personal ownership.What Is Trezor Suite?Trezor Suite is the official wallet management software developed by SatoshiLabs, the creators of the world's first Bitcoin hardware wallet. It acts as the control center for Trezor devices, allowing users to:Send, receive, and manage cryptocurrenciesView portfolio balances and transaction historyConfigure device security settingsBuy, sell, and exchange crypto through integrated partnersEnhance privacy with advanced network and coin-control toolsUnlike browser extensions or third-party wallets, Trezor Suite is purpose-built to work exclusively with Trezor hardware wallets, ensuring maximum compatibility and security.Desktop® Application vs Web AppTrezor Suite is available in two formats, each designed to meet different user needs.Trezor Suite Desktop®The Desktop® application is the recommended option for users who prioritize the highest level of security. Installed directly on your computer, it minimizes exposure to browser-based threats such as phishing attacks, malicious extensions, or spoofed websites.Key advantages of Desktop®:Runs in a secure, isolated environmentSupports Tor integration at the application levelFaster performance and offline verificationIdeal for long-term holders and advanced usersTrezor Suite Desktop® is available for Windows, macOS, and Linux, making it accessible across major operating systems.Trezor Suite Web AppThe Web App offers convenience and accessibility without compromising on core security principles. It runs directly in a supported browser and does not require installation, making it suitable for quick access or use on shared devices (with caution).

Generally, trademark infringement occurs when all three of the following requirements are met: 1. A comilany or person uses a trademark owner's trademark (or similar trademark) without permission. 2. That use is in commerce, meaning that it's done in connection with the sale or promotion of goods or services. 3. That use is likely to confuse consumers about the source, endorsement or affiliation of the goods or services. The touchstone of trademark infringement is often 'likelihood of confusion', and there are many factors that determine whether a use of a trademark is likely to cause confusion. For example, when a person's trademark is also used by someone else, but on unrelated goods or services, that use may not be infringement because it may not cause confusion. Which party used the trademark first can often be an important consideration as well. Privacy Center What is the Privacy Policy and what does it say?
